en_title: The Flower That Did Not Bloom Its Season Through
en_body:
a flower of Love has newly opened
fragilely budding, tearful, offering color and fragrance
the flower awaits the season to burst into dream-color
o flower, for whom do you adorn yourself so bright?
the valley lies still dreaming Desire
longing to climb the hillside and catch the blue sky
wild grasses murmur with the wind
cicadas upon the ancient oak branches
have begun calling sunlight to warm the humble flower's Love
the flower calls the valley's soul from afar to come near
but the vault of heaven enchants the heart of the hill
one season the flower blooms silently in lonely Love
then the flower fades with no one remembering...
